deferred.impact: Resetting it invalidates every anon key, every service-role JWT and every active user session at once.
deferred.affected_consumers: Vercel frontend, all 50 edge functions, every signed-in user.
deferred.required_maintenance_window: Announced downtime window; users will be forcibly signed out.
deferred.rollback: None — the previous signing secret is not recoverable.
deferred.exact_operator_action: Supabase Dashboard, project avmgtsonawtzebvazgcr, Settings, API, Rotate JWT secret. Immediately afterward, update VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY in the Vercel project and any server-side ANON consumers.

deferred.reason: Marked legacy/unused in .env.example. Removing the variable and the dead Deno worker fallback is preferable to rotating a credential nothing depends on.
Test-harness fixture account. Not high-risk, no production data authority.
Short-lived end-user JWT supplied per eval run; it expires on its own and has no rotation mechanism.
